roa.docketEntryComment: Complaint
Bench Warrant Issued
Bench Warrant Recalled
FELONY PLEA TX FILED
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DEFT DECEASED/NP/BWR:19001579/BWR1/CTORD:PROBATION IN #19001579 IS HEREBY TERMINATED/CTORD: FINES AND FEES ARE PERMANENTLY STAYED/CCU/
/CAL:BHC  ADVANCED FROM 08-15-19 PER  MELANIE KUSHNIR/DAWT/X:ORDER FOR RELEASE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/CONTD BEHAVIOR COURT, DOP /CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCING/CTW:120/X: CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IS WAIVED FOR BHC PURPOSES ONLY,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y/4019HALF/X:DEFENDANT SHALL SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE BEHAVIOR HEALTH COURT/WS/DNACOMP/IND/RX/X: NO ALCOHOL/DTC/RESTV/PPRFCOMP/X:POSSESS NO  INCINDIARY DEVICES/SAORD/SA2:150 YARDS FROM INTERSECTION OF JONES AND TURK STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/DEF:  SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS, AND NOT VIOLATE THE STAY AWAY ORDER/CTORD: THAT IF THE DEFENDANT ISPLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATIONOR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND REMANDED INTOCUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW TREATMENT PLACEMENT,/X:IF DEFENDANT LEAVES BHC OR IS TERMINATED FROM BHC, THE PEOPLE WOULD REQUEST REVOCATION OF PROBATION,/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/X:IF THE DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM,   CHARGES MAY BEREDUCED TO A MISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) WITH PROPER FILING OF MOTION,/VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COA:40/ICNA/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD:FINES ANDFEES IN THIS MATTER ARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REINSTATE FINESAND FEES/PROB ADM REV/CONTD:BEHAVIOR COURT/DOP/

/TN:SAMANTHA HULET/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 5 (594(B)1PC, A FELONY) IS GRANTED/FAWA/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:5/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:05-28-19/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/DISPO/X:ISS; PROB 3 Y; CTSO ALCOHOL; VF $300/X:DNACOMP; PROBREVFN; COA $40; ICNA; FINE/X:VICTIM RESTITUTION AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION/X:ADHERENCE TO THE APD AND BHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN WHICH WILL INCLUDE, BASED UPON THE FACTS OF THIS CASE AND DEF'S HISTORY, ANY MEDICATION RECOMMENDED BY A LICENSED PHYSICIAN WORKING WITH THE BHC, AS WELL AS MENTALHEALTH AND OR DRUG TREATMENT/X:SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF BHC/X:STAY AWAY ORDER TO BE FILED AT SENTENCE/X:POSSESS NO INCENDIARY DEVICES, LIGHTERS, ETC,/X:NO NEW ARRESTS OR SAO VIOLATIONS//X:WAIVER OF CUSTODY CREDITS UP TO SENTENCING FOR PURPOSES OF BHC ONLY/X:IFDEF, IS ARRESTED ON NEW CHARGES OF SAO VIOLATIONS, DEF WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT ORTREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEF IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM OR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, DEF WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT ANEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEF, FAILS TO ADHERE TO BHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN, DEF WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND MAY BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEWPLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT THE AGREEMENT OF THE ENTIRE BHC TEAM/X:17(B) REDUCTION UPON GRADUATION FROM BHC/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW60/LD:04-22-19 (60TH)/CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:03-21-19 IN M09FOR BHC PURPOSES/CONTD: PHC & RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT FOR BHC/
